'''palïffïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arabinomannan|arabinomannan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-l-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arabinomannan|arabinomannan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| palïffïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || pælïffïfth || pælïffïfj || pælïffïfsh || pælïffïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || palïflïffïfth || palïflïffïfj || palïflïffïfsh || palïflïffïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || palïffïfth || palïffïfj || palïffïfsh || palïffïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || palïfffïffth || palïfffïffj || palïfffïffsh || palïfffïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || palïffïfïf || palïffïfïf || palïffïfïf || palïffïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || palïffïfth || palïffïfj || palïffïfsh || palïffïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || palïffïfïfl || palïffïfïfl || palïffïfïfl || palïffïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || palïffïfïfïf || palïffïfïfïf || palïffïfïfïf || palïffïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || palïffïfïfn || palïffïfïfn || palïffïfïfn || palïffïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || palïffïfïforo || palïffïfïforo || palïffïfïforo || palïffïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
